allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList ''-NoProfile -Command cd ""C:\\Users\\shiva\\Desktop\\shivangdubey.github.io""; $listener = [System.Net.HttpListener]::new\(\); $listener.Prefixes.Add\(""http://localhost:5500/""\); $listener.Start\(\); while\($true\) { $ctx = $listener.GetContext\(\); $req = $ctx.Request; $res = $ctx.Response; $path = ""C:\\Users\\shiva\\Desktop\\shivangdubey.github.io"" + $req.Url.LocalPath.Replace\(""/"", ""\\""\); if\($path.EndsWith\(""\\""\)\) { $path += ""index.html"" }; if\(Test-Path $path\) { $bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $res.OutputStream.Write\($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length\) }; $res.Close\(\) }'' -WindowStyle Hidden")
